steps.title: Identify the central angle
steps.content: Point $M$ is the center of the circle, so angle $UMV$ is a central angle. A central angle has the same degree measure as its intercepted arc.

steps.title: Use the arc measure
steps.content:
The measure of arc $UV$ is $110^\circ$, so the measure of angle $UMV$ is
$$110^\circ$$The answer is 110.
